expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes supported formats, entry points, and output expectations
expectations.evidence: result.md states: "there is insufficient plan content to verify that the QA plan (at Phase 5b) explicitly covers" the required distinctions, and notes "No Phase 5b artifacts are provided (e.g., checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b draft)." Therefore the case focus is not explicitly covered in any provided output artifact.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: Phase 5b requires artifacts (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta with disposition, and qa_plan_phase5b draft). result.md says: "These artifacts are not present in the benchmark evidence," and execution_notes.md repeats "Missing Phase 5b artifacts." The outputs provided are only execution_notes.md, result.md, and metrics.json, so the run output does not align with phase5b deliverables.
